exampleNote: A filled-in example. Solution = ClothingDatabase; table name = this file's name (UserCredentials). The engine (SQL Server) is set in Database-spec.json.

whatThisModelIs.question: What does this model represent, in one line?

relationships.guidance: How this model connects to others. Leave entries empty if it stands alone.

lookupsAndPerformance.question: Which fields do we search or filter on a lot?

retention.question: How long do we keep this data / when is it deleted?
retention.answer: Kept while the account is active; deleted when the account is closed.

sensitiveFields.question: Any sensitive fields (personal data, payment info) that need extra protection?
sensitiveFields.answer: password — must always be stored hashed, never in plain text.

invariants.question: Anything that must always be true?
